## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passed locally
- [ ] I validated the impacted commands manually
- [ ] I did not introduce unrelated changes

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing behavior changes
- [ ] I updated `README.md` when onboarding/install/quick-start changed
- [ ] I updated wiki guides when flow/commands changed
- [ ] I checked and fixed broken links in touched docs
- [ ] I kept terminology consistent (VS Code, TypeScript, GitHub Classroom)

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Yes (describe below)

## Related Issues

Link issues, discussions, or tasks.
